question.text:
Dear Joanne,
    Kindly request your help for below:
    CULVJED2600332, before we choose SOC, but after checking, the booking should be COC, how should we do to change the bookings to COC? 



Colleeh Zhou/周珂

Specialist

AEM trade,CUL China 

Tel: 021-6858 2021

E-mail: Colleehzhou@culines.com <mail

Web: www.culines.com <http://www.culines.com/> 

	
		 
 

 







收件人: Colleeh Zhou/CUL-CN/AEM Trade <colleehzhou@culines.com>; Lucy.Yan (STRD) <cus@strd-logistics.com.cn>; Tonny Ni/CUL-UAE <tonnyni@culines.com>; sales.cul <sales.cul@ssajeddah.com>; Syed Faiz - SSA JED <cul.tshp1@ssajeddah.com>; MGT.CUL - SSA JED <mgt.cul@s

answer.text:
Dear Colleeh/Irshad,

It can be saved successfully after SOC flag unticked and QTY deleted. Pleaes re-check. Thanks!




Joanne Ding / 丁佳莹

Digital & IT Department

Mobile: +86-13417033072

E-mail: joanneding@culines.com <mail

Web: www.culines.com <http://www.culines.com> 









收件人: Docs.cul – SSA JED <docs.cul@ssajeddah.com>; Lucy.Yan (STRD) <cus@strd-logistics.com.cn>; Tonny Ni/CUL-UAE <tonnyni@culines.com>; sales.cul <sales.cul@ssajeddah.com>; Syed Faiz - SSA JED <cul.tshp1@ssajeddah.com>; MGT.CUL - SSA JED <mgt.cul@ssajeddah.com>; Joanne Ding/CUL-CN/IT <joanneding@culines.com>; #CUL Allegro Support <allegros
